# XCUIElementTypeQueryProvider

**Protocol**

A type that provides ready-made queries for locating descendant UI elements.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor protocol XCUIElementTypeQueryProvider
```

## Overview

Accessing the properties to get queries for descendant elements on an instance of a conforming class (such as an [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIElement] or [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIElementQuery] instance) is equivalent to calling [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIElementQuery/descendants(matching:)] for the corresponding element type.

## Finding the first matching element

- **firstMatch**: The first element that matches the query.

## Querying descendant elements

- **activityIndicators**: A query that matches activity-indicator view elements.
- **alerts**: A query that matches alert view elements.
- **browsers**: A query that matches browser elements.
- **buttons**: A query that matches button control elements.
- **cells**: A query that matches cell elements.
- **checkBoxes**: A query that matches checkbox control elements.
- **collectionViews**: A query that matches collection view elements.
- **colorWells**: A query that matches color-well elements.
- **comboBoxes**: A query that matches combo-box control elements.
- **datePickers**: A query that matches date-picker control elements.
- **decrementArrows**: A query that matches decrement-arrow control elements.
- **dialogs**: A query that matches dialog view elements.
- **disclosureTriangles**: A query that matches disclosure-triangle control elements.
- **disclosedChildRows**: A query that matches disclosed child row elements.
- **dockItems**: A query that matches dock-item control elements.
- **drawers**: A query that matches drawer elements.
- **grids**: A query that matches grid view elements.
- **groups**: A query that matches group elements.
- **handles**: A query that matches handle control elements.
- **helpTags**: A query that matches help-tag elements.
- **icons**: A query that matches icon elements.
- **images**: A query that matches image-view elements.
- **incrementArrows**: A query that matches increment-arrow control elements.
- **keyboards**: A query that matches keyboard elements.
- **keys**: A query that matches key elements.
- **layoutAreas**: A query that matches layout-area elements.
- **layoutItems**: A query that matches layout-item elements.
- **levelIndicators**: A query that matches level-indicator elements.
- **links**: A query that matches link elements.
- **maps**: A query that matches map-view elements.
- **mattes**: A query that matches matte elements.
- **menuBarItems**: A query that matches menu bar item elements.
- **menuBars**: A query that matches menu bar elements.
- **menuButtons**: A query that matches menu button elements.
- **menuItems**: A query that matches menu item elements.
- **menus**: A query that matches menu elements.
- **navigationBars**: A query that matches navigation bar elements.
- **otherElements**: A query that matches other view or control elements.
- **outlineRows**: A query that matches outline row elements.
- **outlines**: A query that matches outline view elements.
- **pageIndicators**: A query that matches page-indicator control elements.
- **pickerWheels**: A query that matches picker-wheel control elements.
- **pickers**: A query that matches picker control elements.
- **popUpButtons**: A query that matches popup-button control elements.
- **popovers**: A query that matches popover view elements.
- **progressIndicators**: A query that matches progress-indicator control elements.
- **radioButtons**: A query that matches radio-button control elements.
- **radioGroups**: A query that matches radio group elements.
- **ratingIndicators**: A query that matches rating-indicator view elements.
- **relevanceIndicators**: A query that matches relevance-indicator view elements.
- **rulerMarkers**: A query that matches ruler marker elements.
- **rulers**: A query that matches ruler view elements.
- **scrollBars**: A query that matches scroll bar elements.
- **scrollViews**: A query that matches scroll view elements.
- **searchFields**: A query that matches search field elements.
- **secureTextFields**: A query that matches secure text field elements.
- **segmentedControls**: A query that matches segmented control elements.
- **sheets**: A query that matches sheet elements.
- **sliders**: A query that matches slider elements.
- **splitGroups**: A query that matches split group elements.
- **splitters**: A query that matches splitter elements.
- **staticTexts**: A query that matches static-text view elements.
- **statusBars**: A query that matches status bar elements.
- **statusItems**: A query that matches status item elements.
- **steppers**: A query that matches stepper elements.
- **switches**: A query that matches switch control elements.
- **tabBars**: A query that matches tab bar elements.
- **tabGroups**: A query that matches tab group elements.
- **tableColumns**: A query that matches table column elements.
- **tableRows**: A query that matches table row elements.
- **tables**: A query that matches table elements.
- **tabs**: A query that matches tab elements.
- **textFields**: A query that matches text field elements.
- **textViews**: A query that matches text view elements.
- **timelines**: A query that matches timeline view elements.
- **toggles**: A query that matches toggle control elements.
- **toolbarButtons**: A query that matches toolbar button elements.
- **toolbars**: A query that matches toolbar elements.
- **touchBars**: A query that matches touch bar elements.
- **valueIndicators**: A query that matches value indicator elements.
- **webViews**: A query that matches web view elements.
- **windows**: A query that matches window elements.

## UI element queries

- **XCUIElementQuery**: An object that defines the search criteria a test uses to identify UI elements.

## Conforming Types

- XCUIApplication
- XCUIElement
- XCUIElementQuery
- XCUISiriService
